title: Khaşab Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Khaşab with a Z-Score of +5.80. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Khaşab is at a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature is causing a significant increase in cooling degree days (CDD) with a value of 19.3 GG, while the humidity is relatively low at 11%. 
 The wind speed is moderate at 19.7 km/h, but it is not providing much relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
